headline: FedEx Stock Rebounds After Drop As Amazon Push Raises Competition Concerns
summary: Shares of FedEx (NYSE: FDX) rose on Tuesday after Monday's plunge due to Amazon's logistics platform launch, intensifying pressure on FedEx's core business.
